commit.subject: LU-0000 llite: don't get time for tiny writes
commit.message:
LU-0000 llite: don't get time for tiny writes

If successful, tiny writes don't take enough time to
measure, but ktime_get does cost about 15% of the
performance.

Note that in the PCC case, the tiny write checks will
never be successful, so it's OK to put it first.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I25e3007ab5d5ca23922514d53e3f4d7da2c2cc85
